task: I’m trying to put together a budget-friendly iPad Air M3 bundle without overpaying, so could you start on Target and look through the actual iPad Air M3 product pages to see which listed configuration is cheapest right now, including any sale price or visible discount text, and leave the cheapest product page open so I can look at the photos and storage/color details myself. Once you know which Target deal is the lowest, use that as the anchor for the bundle and go to Best Buy to find an Apple Magic Keyboard listing for the iPad Pro 13-inch that’s specifically open-box or refurbished and in Good condition, because I want a lower-cost keyboard option for a large Apple tablet setup; open that listing in its own tab so I can compare it side by side with the iPad. After that, check Amazon for a protective case for the iPad Air M3 that explicitly says it supports portrait-mode stand positioning, and open the actual product page so you can quote the wording that proves portrait support and I can verify the listing details on screen. To round things out, hop over to Slickdeals and see what the current featured top deal for iPads is, then tell me the deal title and price so I can decide whether it makes more sense to buy this bundle now or wait for a broader tech bargain. In the end, give me a short bundle summary anchored on the cheapest Target iPad Air M3 you found, with the keyboard, the portrait-capable case, and the Slickdeals iPad deal.
grader_reasoning:
R1: success - The agent searched Target for "iPad Air M3" and identified the 11-inch Wi-Fi 128GB model as the cheapest available option at $499.99 (on sale from $599.99). The agent also investigated a "Target Certified Refurbished" option at $459.99 but correctly identified that it was out of stock ("This combination isn’t available"). The agent left the $499.99 product page open as the anchor for the bundle. The price, discount information, and configuration are clearly identified and verified in the action history and summary.

R2: success - The agent successfully navigated to Best Buy and searched for an Apple Magic Keyboard for the iPad Pro 13-inch. In step 15, the agent specifically selected an "Open-Box Good" condition listing for the "Apple - Magic Keyboard for iPad Pro 13‑inch (M5) - Black" at a price of $257.99. This satisfies the requirement to find an open-box or refurbished listing in Good condition with the price clearly identified.

R3: success - The agent successfully navigated to an Amazon product page for an "ESR for iPad Air 11 Inch Case" (Step 22/23). The agent verified the portrait-mode support by quoting the product title ("Adjustable Portrait/Landscape Stand") and the product description ("stable stand for portrait and landscape viewing") in Step 28. The product page was confirmed to be open in the final summary.

R4: success - The agent navigated to Slickdeals and performed a search for "ipad" (Step 31). In the final summary (Step 36), the agent explicitly reported a featured deal: "128GB 11\" Apple iPad Air M3 Wi-Fi + Cellular Tablet (Blue, Unlocked) at $499, listed as $749 before discount, 33% off." This satisfies the requirement to report the current featured top deal on Slickdeals for iPads, including its title and displayed price.

R5: success - The agent successfully completed all components of the task. It identified the cheapest Target iPad Air M3 ($499.99), found an open-box "Good" condition Magic Keyboard at Best Buy ($257.99), located an Amazon case with explicit portrait-mode support, and referenced a Slickdeals iPad deal. The final summary provided in the last step clearly anchors the bundle on the Target iPad and incorporates all required components in a budget-oriented framing.

rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the reported price, discount text, and configuration match the cheapest visible Target iPad Air M3 product page left open.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent searched Target for "iPad Air M3" and identified the 11-inch Wi-Fi 128GB model as the cheapest available option at $499.99 (on sale from $599.99). rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the Best Buy tab shows a qualifying listing with compatibility for iPad Pro 13-inch, condition marked Good, and the reported price.

rubric_results.requirement: Provide one Amazon protective case for iPad Air (M3), include the product name, and quote listing text that explicitly confirms portrait-mode stand positioning support.
rubric_results.verification: Grader confirms the Amazon product page is open and contains the quoted text explicitly indicating portrait-mode stand support.
rubric_results.final_reasoning: The agent successfully navigated to an Amazon product page for an "ESR for iPad Air 11 Inch Case" (Step 22/23). The agent verified the portrait-mode support by quoting the product title ("Adjustable Portrait/Landscape Stand") and the product description ("stable stand for portrait and landscape viewing") in Step 28. In the final summary (Step 36), the agent explicitly reported a featured deal: "128GB 11\" Apple iPad Air M3 Wi-Fi + Cellular Tablet (Blue, Unlocked) at $499, listed as $749 before discount, 33% off." It identified the cheapest Target iPad Air M3 ($499.99), found an open-box "Good" condition Magic Keyboard at Best Buy ($257.99), located an Amazon case with explicit portrait-mode support, and referenced a Slickdeals iPad deal.
